name: ATP 30 Public Company Limited
summary: ATP 30 Public Company Limited provides transport services in Thailand. The company offers shuttle services to factory employees of industrial estate. As of December 31, 2020, it owned and operated 347 vehicles, including 211 buses, 38 mini-buses, 91 vans, and 7 VIP vans, as well as 66 affiliated vehicles comprising 61 vans and 5 buses. The company was formerly known as Amata Transport 30 Limited Company. ATP 30 Public Company Limited was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Chonburi, Thailand.
